_comment: nagsly config. install.sh seeds this to ~/.config/nagsly/config.json (never overwriting an existing one). All knobs are also overridable via an UPPER_SNAKE env var of the same name (e.g. ALARM_TIMEOUT=4) for tests and one-offs. NO SECRETS live here — the calendar feed is the per-source events.d/*.json files a fetcher writes.
_arm_window: Don't arm a fire until within this many seconds of firing (bounds long sleeps + shrinks reschedule/cancel exposure). Must exceed the launchd poll interval (300s) so nothing is skipped between polls.
_modes: 1=on, 0=off. Run toast-only at first (toast_enabled 1, alarm_enabled 0) to build trust that nagsly sees your meetings, then flip the loud alarm on.
_alarm: sound_file: any file afplay can play; built-ins live in /System/Library/Sounds/*.aiff (Sosumi, Ping, Glass, Funk, ...). afplay does ALL audio; alerter is visual only. alarm_timeout: hard stop for the loop if never dismissed (seconds).
